_protocol: Phase 3.5-PRAGMATIC: 5+red+5 fetches with adversarial gap review, then operator LR commit with per-LR citations

extracted.implication_via_historical_models: Trump approval below 50% historically associated with avg 37 House seat loss; greater losses as approval drops further

extracted.georgia_house_runoff: Dem Harris lost by 11.8 but +25 vs 2024 baseline
extracted.iowa_sd35_post_inauguration: +24 swing, flipped Trump+21 seat to D
extracted.pattern: Sustained massive D overperformance since Trump inauguration

gaps_identified: H4 (R expand) lacks supporting source — historical base rate not anchored
FEC Q1 2026 DCCC/NRCC fundraising + candidate quality missing
Generic ballot single snapshot, no trend or house-effect adjustment

extracted._h4_base_rate_first_term_no_security_sho: approximately 2-3% (1 of ~30+ modern first-term midterms; 2002 was post-9/11 security shock context)

extracted.ohio: Redrew per constitutional amendment requiring redraws after non-bipartisan-passed maps expire
extracted.new_york: Constitutionally constrained from changing before 2026; Dems exploring
extracted._net_directional_estimate: Modest D-leaning aggregate shift; NC redraw could net Dems 1-2 seats; OH redraw direction TBD

extracted._record: 36 R retirements BREAKS 2018 single-party record of 34 R retirements
extracted._implication: anti_h3_gop_retirement_wave indicator threshold (>=15) FIRES; historical analogue to 2018 when Dems won +40

extracted.battleground_dynamic: D challengers outraising R incumbents in key races; R incumbents have aggregate cash edge

extracted.translation_to_seats: 12-20 R seat losses if current generic ballot holds

topic_priors.rationale: 10-source corpus strongly supports D modal outcome. Source 5 (R retirement record 36 vs 22) is historical analog to 2018 when Dems won +40. Source 5 (generic ballot D+5.4 stable) implies 12-20 R seat losses. Source 1 special election overperformance massive (+12 to +25). Source 1 Trump approval ~39%. H4 base rate from Source 6 (historical) ~2-3% conditional on no security shock. H1 elevated to ~0.26 reflecting genuine wave-environment markers but constrained by competitive seat geography (only 17 toss-ups). H3 down to ~0.20 reflecting evidence environment heavily favors D. H4 to ~0.04 floor.

_lr_commit_summary.per_indicator_implications: see indicator desc fields. Key: t1_genballot_d_plus_3_to_7 currently FIRING (D+5.4 in band); t2_presidential_approval_below_40 currently FIRING; anti_h3_gop_retirement_wave currently FIRING (36 vs threshold 15); t1_dem_special_election_overperformance trending toward firing.
